ensemble_members: ElasticNetCV, SVR, Random forest, Extra trees, AdaBoost, Tabular MLP, Tabular CNN, XGBoost, CatBoost, MapLight CatBoost (Strict Parity), Chemprop v2 (AttentiveFP, ensemble=1), Chemprop v2 (AttentiveFP + Selected descriptors, ensemble=1), CFA (Combinatorial Fusion)
